_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.
_publications._context: NF1-associated MPNST cells (sNF96.2, ATCC; MPNST642, MD Anderson; T265, A. Harder) | MPNST cell lines (STS-26T, S462, S462TY, T265) were obtained from Dr. David Largaespada's laboratory | Immortalized human Schwann cell and MPNST cell lines (S462 [ 34 ], S462-TY [ 35 ], ST8814 [ 36 ], T265 [ 37 ], and STS-26T [ 38 ]) | human MPNST cell lines (ST88-14, STS26T, S462, S462-TY, and T265) | Human MPNST cell lines S462 and T265 were described previously...NF1 associated MPNST derived from S462 but not T265 cells form solid subcutaneous tumors | Human T265, S462, and NSF1 cell lines of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs) being associated with neurofibromatosis type 1 | The MPNST cell lines STS26T, T265, and ST8814 have been reported before and were gifted by Dr. Nancy Ratner | Human MPNST cell lines (S462, T265, and NSF1) were analyzed and have been described in detail in our previous studies | Immortalized human Schwann cell and MPNST cell lines (S462 ( 45 ), S462-TY ( 35 ), ST8814 ( 46 ), T265 ( 47 ), and STS-26T ( 36 ))
